version_policy: Versions accumulates verified boot archives without a hard cap.
debt_visibility_policy: mandatory explicit debts in a separate human-readable copyable debt block; Cycle Guard enforces three terminal blocks.
organ_precedence: If a Self/project organ duplicates a core organ, the layer organ governs the execution surface; substantial calculation routes to BOIS:SIMA&BORIS or to an explicitly declared layer philosophical center in its domain.
cycle_guard_repair_v016: Terminal copy blocks repaired; author support must be last; archive verification is self-triggered when required and separated from Versions debt.
bare_archive_definition: bare physiology without memory, with formation/QA tools and Drive pointer; full state lives in personal versions and project archives with project memory.
language_canon_repair_v016: English layer physiology PDF is canonical; Russian and machine-readable surfaces are translations/projections.
semantic_root_repair_v016: Error repair must identify and repair semantic roots, then rerun failing and adjacent scenarios.
debt_versions_precheck_repair_v018: Before printing a Versions upload/verify debt, check the target Versions folder when access and folder identity are available; close the debt if metadata match.
layered_debt_policy_v018: Terminal debts are grouped by Self/core and by each active project layer, with closed items separated.
latest_repair_note: route consistency check and project-owned debt grouping repair
v023_patch: state-hardening, prefix-aware hashes, append-only correction, active Cycle Guard mode, artifact branch substrate, project/runtime/publication boundary, QA-E validation gate, copyable theme blocks
artifact_branch_substrate_policy: Version-tracked artifact branches require a Drive folder or accepted replacement substrate; the link must be stored in the archive and owning physiological PDF.
r2_repair: Support message and URLs restored; anonymization cannot remove or replace author support surface.
